source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A small turbine is operated at part load by throttling a 0.25-kg/s steam supply at 1.4 MPa and 250\circ\text{C} down to 1.1 MPa before it enters the turbine, and the exhaust is at 10 kPa. If the turbine produces 110 kW, find the exhaust temperature (and quality if saturated).

If the turbine produces 110 kW, find the exhaust temperature (and quality if saturated).
